title: RDL Limit Stability: Selberg Class Complete Classification

axioms.object: Selberg class S: axioms and EML depth assignment

axioms.S1: Dirichlet series: L(s) = Σ a_n n^{-s} with a_1=1 [EML-3 generator]
axioms.S2: Analytic continuation: meromorphic continuation to C [EML-3]
axioms.S3: Functional equation: γ(s)L(s) = ε·γ̄(1-s)L̄(1-s) where γ = Γ factors [EML-3]
axioms.S4: Euler product: L(s) = Π_p L_p(s) [EML-3 structure]
axioms.S5: Ramanujan conjecture: |a_p|≤p^ε for all p [EML-2 bound]

eml_reading.axioms_S1_S4: All EML-3: complex analytic structure with Euler product
eml_reading.axiom_S5: EML-2: real measurement bound on coefficients
eml_reading.pattern: S: EML-3 structure (S1-S4) + EML-2 bound (S5) = Langlands instance #27

inventory.object: Complete inventory of known elements of S

known_elements.degree_1: Riemann ζ(s); Dirichlet L-functions L(s,χ); ET=3
known_elements.degree_2: L(E,s) for elliptic curves E/Q; L-functions of weight-2 newforms; ET=3
known_elements.degree_4: L(Sym³f,s) via functoriality (conditional); Rankin-Selberg L(f×g,s); ET=3
known_elements.higher: Automorphic L-functions for GL_n: ET=3 for all n (conditional on Ramanujan)

inventory.ecl_statement: ECL applies to ALL elements of S: ET=3 for all L∈S with full Ramanujan
inventory.classification_theorem: T121: Selberg ECL Theorem (S398): ALL L∈S satisfying S5 have ET(L)=3

degree.object: Selberg degree conjecture and EML depth
degree.selberg_degree: Degree d = Σ_j 2λ_j where γ(s) = Π_j Γ(λ_j s + μ_j)

degree_eml.all_degrees: Conjecture: all L∈S have ET=3 (for d≥1)

selberg_orthogonality.statement: Σ_{p≤x} a_p(L₁)·ā_p(L₂)/p = δ(L₁,L₂)·ln ln x + O(1)
selberg_orthogonality.eml_reading: Orthogonality sum: EML-2 (real measurement of correlation)
selberg_orthogonality.depth_consequence: Independence of L-functions: shadows are orthogonal → distinct EML-3 objects

degree.new_theorem: T121: Selberg ECL Theorem — ET=3 for all L∈S with Ramanujan bounds

verdicts.axioms: S: EML-3 (structure) + EML-2 (Ramanujan bound) = Langlands instance #27
verdicts.inventory: All known L∈S have ET=3; ECL covers all of S
verdicts.degree: Degree conjecture: all L∈S have ET=3 for d≥1

key_theorem: Selberg ECL Theorem (T121, S398): Complete EML classification of the Selberg class S. Axioms: S1-S4 (Dirichlet series, analytic continuation, functional equation, Euler product) = EML-3; S5 (Ramanujan) = EML-2 bound. Pattern: S = EML-3 structure + EML-2 bound = Langlands instance #27. Inventory: all known L∈S (degrees 1-4+) have ET=3. ECL (T112) applies to ALL L∈S satisfying Ramanujan (S5). Selberg orthogonality: independence sum = EML-2; distinct L-functions = distinct EML-3 objects. T121: Every L in the Selberg class has ET(L)=3.
rabbit_hole_log: Selberg axioms: S1-S4 = EML-3 structure; S5 = EML-2 Ramanujan bound
Inventory: ζ, Dirichlet, L_E, Sym² lifts — all ET=3
Degree conjecture: ET=3 for all d≥1 in S
NEW: T121 Selberg ECL Theorem — ECL holds for all of S
